description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to main and develop branches, on pull requests to those branches, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch and call. The workflow should have a concurrency group named pyngrok-singleton. It should use a matrix strategy to run a build job on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest environments with various Python versions, including 3.12 and older versions. The job should check out the repository, set up the Python environment, install dependencies with make install, and run tests with make test.
